title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 60.205 - Failure to perform duties, civil action to obtain fine, amount
text:
60.205.  Failure to perform duties, civil action to obtain fine, amount. — Any county surveyor who shall fail to perform the duties required of him by this chapter shall be fined in a sum not exceeding ninety dollars, to be recovered by civil action, at the suit of the injured party.
(L. 1989 H.B. 190, et al.)
